heading: Stones River National Battlefield; establishment; appointment of commission

children.text: A commissioned officer of the Corps of Engineers, United States Army;
A veteran of the Civil War who served honorably in the military forces of the United States; and
A veteran of the Civil War who served honorably in the military forces of the Confederate States of America.
